about_text: MSc in Music and Acoustic Engineering. I build agentic AI products: full-stack, voice agents, and automation pipelines. Background in deep learning for audio, generative models, and signal analysis. Also active as a trainer in computer science and electronics.
about_closing: Currently open to opportunities in applied AI research for audio and music technology.
proj_shy_order_title: SHY ORDER — AUTONOMOUS VOICE AGENT WITH OUTBOUND CALLING
proj_shy_order_bullet1: Chats with the user via browser to collect booking details
proj_shy_order_bullet2: Autonomously calls the restaurant via Twilio, handling the full phone conversation end-to-end
proj_shy_order_bullet3: Admin dashboard with session analytics, revenue tracking, and user management — built with Next.js, Supabase Auth, deployed on Vercel
proj_dance_title: RITMO TROPICALE VOICE AGENT — INBOUND AI PHONE ASSISTANT FOR DANCE SCHOOL
proj_dance_bullet1: Inbound voice agent 24/7: identifies students, books classes, schedules makeup sessions, and handles trial lesson requests — entirely over the phone
proj_dance_bullet2: Real-time voice pipeline with barge-in support: Deepgram STT → GPT-4o with parallel tool calling → ElevenLabs TTS streaming (IT/ES)
proj_dance_bullet3: Admin dashboard with call analytics, booking trends, and student management — built with Next.js, Supabase Auth, and deployed on Vercel
proj_beat_bullet1: End-to-end music e-commerce with Stripe payments, license contract PDF generation, and Cloudflare R2 audio delivery
proj_beat_bullet2: Producer dashboard with beat management, scheduled releases, AI-powered email notifications, and analytics with CSV export
proj_beat_bullet3: Google OAuth, multilingual support (IT/EN/ES), WaveSurfer.js waveform player, and direct-to-storage upload architecture
proj_invoice_bullet1: Automates invoicing via Fiscozen and sends personalized client emails
proj_invoice_bullet2: Syncs Google Calendar sessions to Notion; auto-books on third-party platforms
proj_invoice_bullet3: Runs daily across invoicing, email dispatch, session logging, and booking
proj1_title: BEYOND SPACE — AUDIO GENERATION VIA RAVE LATENT SPACE INTERPOLATION
proj1_bullet1: Upload up to 4 audio files and interpolate between their RAVE latent encodings via a 2D board
proj1_bullet2: Barycentric weighting — click position sets the blend across all inputs simultaneously
proj1_bullet3: FastAPI + TorchScript backend on HF Spaces, React frontend on Vercel
training1_desc: ML for audio: fundamentals, neural networks, generative models and transformers.

parallel subagents and RAG vs Grep search over a Markdown knowledge base. No frameworks.
